prompt_text:
### Demographics: 40-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.6 kg; Height 175.3 cm; BMI 20.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 136/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.0%; 9 months ago 7.8%; 6 months ago 7.6%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 218mg/dL; 9 months ago 182mg/dL; 6 months ago 157mg/dL; 3 months ago 179mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 64.8kg; 9 months ago 59.6kg; 6 months ago 58.3kg; 3 months ago 57.8kg; current 63.6kg), Height (12 months ago 175.3cm; 9 months ago 175.3cm; 6 months ago 175.3cm; 3 months ago 175.3cm; current 175.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 139mmHg; 9 months ago 139mmHg; 6 months ago 141mmHg; 3 months ago 140mmHg; current 136mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 80mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 50U/L; 9 months ago 47U/L; 6 months ago 45U/L; 3 months ago 44U/L; current 52U/L), AST (12 months ago 46U/L; 9 months ago 52U/L; 6 months ago 44U/L; 3 months ago 47U/L; current 47U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.4mg/dL; current 1.4mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 53mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 55mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 50mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 135mg/g; 9 months ago 133mg/g; 6 months ago 211mg/g; 3 months ago 210mg/g; current 124mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 48mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 47mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 153mg/dL; 6 months ago 133mg/dL; 3 months ago 149mg/dL; current 143mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 14.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.2g/dL; 3 months ago 13.9g/dL; current 13.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.05 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
